title: I Hate Myself for Loving You
title_raw: I Hate Myself for Loving You
group_key: i hate myself for loving you|joan jett & the blackhearts

lyrics.text: Midnight gettin' uptight Where are you
lyrics.translation: 午夜时分 气氛正好而你在哪里？

lyrics.text: You said you'd meet me now it's quarter to two
lyrics.translation: 你说会来找我 但此时此刻已经一点四十五分

lyrics.text: I know I'm hangin' but I'm still wantin' you
lyrics.translation: 我明白自己犹豫不决 但我依然需要你

lyrics.text: Hey Jack It's a fact they're talkin' in town
lyrics.translation: 嘿 杰克 城里的人们真的议论纷纷

lyrics.text: I turn my back and you're messin' around
lyrics.translation: 我置若罔闻 你却越闹越大

lyrics.text: I'm not really jealous don't like lookin' like a clown
lyrics.translation: 我不是真的吃醋 只是不想被人当小丑看待

lyrics.text: I think of you every night and day
lyrics.translation: 我日日夜夜都想着你

lyrics.text: You took my heart then you took my pride away
lyrics.translation: 你带走了我的心 然后又夺走了我的尊严

lyrics.text: I hate myself for loving you
lyrics.translation: 我恨自己爱上了你

lyrics.text: Can't break free from the things that you do
lyrics.translation: 无法从你的所作所为中泰然自若

lyrics.text: I wanna walk but I run back to you that's why
lyrics.translation: 我曾经离开 却又回到你身边

lyrics.text: I hate myself for loving you
lyrics.translation: 我恨自己爱上了你

lyrics.text: Daylight spent the night without you
lyrics.translation: 白天了 我没有你而过了一晚

lyrics.text: But I've been dreamin' 'bout the lovin' you do
lyrics.translation: 但我一直梦想着你的爱

lyrics.text: I won't be as angry 'bout the hell you put me through
lyrics.translation: 你对我那么糟 但我已经没那么生气了

lyrics.text: Hey man bet you can treat me right
lyrics.translation: 嗨 老兄 我打赌你会对我好

lyrics.text: He just doesn't know what you was missin' last night
lyrics.translation: 你只是不清楚昨晚错过了什么

lyrics.text: I wanna see your face and say forget it just from spite
lyrics.translation: 我想看看你 告诉你忘掉这些不愉快

lyrics.text: I think of you every night and day
lyrics.translation: 我日日夜夜都想着你

lyrics.text: You took my heart then you took my pride away
lyrics.translation: 你带走了我的心 然后又夺走了我的尊严

lyrics.text: I hate myself for loving you
lyrics.translation: 我恨自己爱上了你

lyrics.text: Can't break free from the things that you do
lyrics.translation: 无法从你的所作所为中泰然自若

lyrics.text: I wanna walk but I run back to you, that's why
lyrics.translation: 我曾经离开 却又回到你身边

lyrics.translation: 我恨自己爱上了你

lyrics.text: I hate myself I hate myself for loving you
lyrics.translation: 我真的恨自己爱上了你
